_meta.description: Research interests and experience timeline. Interests feed the Research page; experiences populate the detailed narrative cards.

fields.experiences: Array of { title, period, role, advisor, funding, summary, bullets, tags }

interests.title: Embodied AI Systems
interests.description: Integrating perception, planning, and control in long-horizon physical tasks.

interests.title: Robot Learning
interests.description: Sample-efficient policy learning for manipulation, navigation, and adaptation.

interests.title: Human-Robot Collaboration
interests.description: Interfaces and autonomy strategies for safe, interpretable teamwork.

interests.title: Edge Deployment
interests.description: Moving modern autonomy pipelines onto real devices with tight compute budgets.

experiences.title: Adaptive Mobile Manipulation for Cluttered Labs
experiences.summary: Building perception-driven manipulation policies that remain stable under shifting layouts and sparse demonstrations.
bullets: Combined language-conditioned task prompts with vision-based affordance maps.
Reduced reset time by introducing reusable evaluation scenes and scripted calibration checks.

experiences.title: Multi-Robot Inspection in Semi-Structured Environments
experiences.summary: Designed coordination logic for heterogeneous robots performing inspection rounds across changing indoor facilities.
bullets: Implemented map-sharing and fallback routing for intermittent connectivity.
Benchmarked task completion under degraded sensing and delayed communication.

experiences.title: Learning-Based Navigation Stack for Service Robots
experiences.summary: Explored hybrid navigation pipelines that blend classical planners with learned scene priors.
bullets: Added safety envelopes around low-confidence detections in crowded hallways.
Improved recovery behavior after localization loss through state-aware replanning.

interests.title: 具身智能系统
interests.description: 将感知、规划与控制统一到长时程物理任务中，提升真实环境下的执行可靠性。

interests.title: 机器人学习
interests.description: 关注操控、导航与自适应任务中的高样本效率学习方法。

interests.title: 人机协作
interests.description: 研究可解释、安全且具备协作意识的交互与自治策略。

interests.title: 边缘部署
interests.description: 将现代自主系统能力压缩到算力受限的真实设备中。

experiences.title: 面向实验室复杂场景的自适应移动操控
experiences.summary: 构建由感知驱动的移动操控策略，使系统在布局频繁变化和示例稀缺时仍保持稳定表现。
bullets: 结合语言条件任务提示与视觉可供性地图进行动作生成。
通过可复用评测场景和脚本化标定流程降低实验重置成本。

experiences.title: 半结构化环境中的多机器人巡检
experiences.summary: 为异构机器人设计协同巡检逻辑，以适应设施环境持续变化和不稳定通信条件。
bullets: 实现地图共享与断连回退路径策略。
系统评估感知退化和通信延迟下的任务完成率。

experiences.title: 服务机器人学习型导航系统
experiences.summary: 探索结合经典规划器与学习先验的混合式导航系统。
bullets: 在拥挤走廊场景中为低置信度感知结果加入安全缓冲策略。
通过状态感知重规划改进定位丢失后的恢复行为。
